title: No More Bleeding Sheep
description: Stops Evokers from turning blue sheep into red sheep
body: # No More Bleeding Sheep! (NMBS) ###### by OakBricks --- This mod attempts to stop evokers from turning blue sheep into red sheep. # Why? i dont know, for fun i guess # How? mixin and overwrites # A Note on Mod Compatibility Because of the way this mod is written, the mod might not be compatible with every mod, especially if the other mod is using mixin to mixinto one of the methods the mod is overwriting
